description_long: This lamp object consists of a row of four identical, vertically oriented lantern-style lamps, each mounted on a decorative stand. The lamps feature domed, colored shades in green, blue, and red, with perforated edges and cylindrical bodies beneath, likely made of metal with glass panels. Each lamp is supported by a slender, ornate post and a round, weighted base, giving the structure stability. The tops of the lamps have small finials, and the shades are adorned with a ring or loop, possibly for hanging or carrying. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage or traditional street or garden lamps, with a focus on both function and decorative appeal. The arrangement suggests it could serve as a multi-lamp fixture for outdoor or communal urban spaces.
description: A decorative row of four vintage-style lantern lamps with colored domed shades and ornate metal stands, suitable for outdoor or communal urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four lamps with their colored domed shades and ornate bases clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the stacked alignment of the lamps, highlighting the alternating colored shades and the vertical structure.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all four lamps and their decorative features visible from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the vertical stacking of the lamps and the sequence of colored shades.
